title: Installer Run: Full Install/Update Orchestration
constructor_signature: __construct(IOInterface $io, Config $config, RootPackageInterface $package, DownloadManager $downloadManager, RepositoryManager $repositoryManager, Locker $locker, InstallationManager $installationManager, EventDispatcher $eventDispatcher, AutoloadGenerator $autoloadGenerator)
interaction_flow: Installer → Locker: isLocked() [if !update and !locked → force update=true]
Installer → InstallationManager: notifyInstalls($io) [if executeOperations && install && notify-on-install]
[if runScripts] Installer → EventDispatcher: dispatchScript(PRE_UPDATE_CMD or PRE_INSTALL_CMD)
[if dumpAutoloader] Installer → AutoloadGenerator: dump(config, localRepo, package, installationManager, ...)
[if runScripts] Installer → EventDispatcher: dispatchScript(POST_UPDATE_CMD or POST_INSTALL_CMD)
Installer → Auditor: audit(io, repoSet, packages, ...) [if auditConfig.audit]
Installer → RepositorySet: createPool($request, $io, $eventDispatcher, $poolOptimizer, ...) → Pool [internally uses PoolBuilder]
Installer → Installer: extractDevPackages($lockTransaction, ...) [second solver pass for non-dev]
Installer → Locker: setLockData(newLockPackages, devPackages, platformReqs, ...) [writes lock file]
[if !alreadySolved] Installer → Request: fixLockedPackage($pkg) for each locked package
[if !alreadySolved] Installer → Solver: solve($request, ...) → LockTransaction [validates lock file]
key_relationships: Installer depends_on EventDispatcher (script dispatch, installer events)
Installer depends_on Locker (isLocked, getLockedRepository, setLockData, isFresh)
Installer creates Solver (new Solver(policy, pool, io))
RepositorySet creates Pool (via createPool, internally delegates to PoolBuilder)
Solver consumes Pool and Request, produces LockTransaction
LocalRepoTransaction compares lockedRepository vs localRepo, produces install/update/uninstall operations
InstallationManager consumes operations from LocalRepoTransaction and uses DownloadManager internally
branching_logic: run(): if update → doUpdate() else doInstall()
run(): if dryRun → disable executeOperations, writeLock, dumpAutoloader, runScripts
doUpdate(): if doInstall → call doInstall(alreadySolved=true) at end
doInstall(): if alreadySolved → skip platform verification solver pass
doInstall(): if executeOperations → installationManager->execute() else just output ops
important_notes: Installer.run() is the top-level orchestrator. The update path (doUpdate) runs the dependency solver to produce a LockTransaction and writes composer.lock, then optionally calls doInstall. The install path (doInstall) reads from the lock file, optionally re-validates against the platform, then creates a LocalRepoTransaction to compute the delta between locked and installed packages, fires PRE_OPERATIONS_EXEC event, and delegates package execution to InstallationManager. PoolBuilder is invoked internally by RepositorySet::createPool() — not directly by Installer. EventDispatcher is called for PRE/POST_INSTALL_CMD, PRE/POST_UPDATE_CMD, and PRE_OPERATIONS_EXEC events.
